message.content: ```plantuml @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8 skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14 skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain skinparam classMethodFontSize 12 skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12 skinparam classAttributePadding 5 skinparam classMethodPadding 5 skinparam classHeaderPadding 5 skinparam classPadding 5 skinparam classMargin 10 skinparam classSpacing 10 skinparam classAlignment left skinparam classTextAlignment left skinparam classIconSize 0 skinparam classIconPadding 0 skinparam classIconMargin 0 skinparam classIconSpacing 0 skinparam classIconAlignment left skinparam classIconTextAlignment left skinparam classIconFontStyle plain skinparam classIconFontSize 12 skinparam classIconColor black skinparam classIconBackgroundColor white skinparam classIconBorderColor black skinparam classIconBorderThickness 1 skinparam classIconBorderRadius 0 skinparam classIconBorderDashArray skinparam classIconBorderDashOffset 0 skinparam classIconBorderLineCap butt skinparam classIconBorderLineJoin miter skinparam classIconBorderMiterLimit 4 skinparam classIconBorderOpacity 1 skinparam classIconBorderStrokeDashArray skinparam classIconBorderStrokeDashOffset 0 skinparam classIconBorderStrokeLineCap butt skinparam classIconBorderStrokeLineJoin miter skinparam classIconBorderStrokeMiterLimit 4 skinparam classIconBorderStrokeOpacity 1 skinparam classIconBorderStrokeWidth 1 skinparam classIconBorderWidth 1 skinparam classIconHeight 20 skinparam classIconWidth 20 skinparam classIconX 0 skinparam classIconY 0 skinparam classIconZIndex 0 skinparam classIconOpacity 1 skinparam classIconRotation 0 skinparam classIconScale 1 skinparam classIconTransform none skinparam classIconTransformOrigin center skinparam classIconTransformBox border-box skinparam classIconTransformStyle flat skinparam classIconBackfaceVisibility visible skinparam classIconPerspective none skinparam classIconPerspectiveOrigin 50% 50% skinparam classIconTransformBox border-box skinparam classIconTransformStyle flat skinparam classIconBackfaceVisibility visible skinparam classIconPerspective none skinparam classIconPerspectiveOrigin 50% 50% class Game { + clock_t start + clock_t end + int curLevel + {const}int MAX_LEVEL + bool isFinish + bool isQuit + Session* curSession -- + handleCmd(char) + handleStartCmd(char) + initSession() + startSession() + endSession() + start() + isFinish() + getDuration() } class Session { + level + map + step + isFinish -- + move(Direction) + getMap() + finish() + isFinish() + getLevel() + backToPreviousPlace() + restart() } class Map { + width:int + height:int + tiles:TileMap + MovableList:vector + player:Player + Tile:OUT_SIDE_TILE -- + getTile() + moveBox() + getWidth() + getHeight() + initMap(const string&) + getStateOf(const Position&) + getBoxs() + getPlayerPosition() + back() } class Player { -- + move(Direction) + getPreviousDirection() + getPreviousPushFlag() + clear() } class Box { + onTarget:bool -- + moveToTile(TileType) + getOnTarget() } class Moveable { + position:Position + state: -- + {virtual}move(Direction) + back(Direction) + getPosition() + setPosition(const Position&) } class Tile { + position:Position + type:TileType + flag:TileFlag -- + setPosition(const Position&) + getPosition() + setFlag(TileFlag) + getType() + getState() } class Position { + x:int + y:int + DIRS -- + operator==(const Position&) + opeartor+=(const Position&) + getX() + getY() + of(int,int) } class Rule { -- + isWin(const Map&) + isRightMove(const Map&,Direction) } class MapRepository { + MAP_PATH:string + MAP_DIR:string + MAP_ID:enum + MapBuffer:class -- + getMap(MAP_ID) } class FileUtil { -- + readFile() } class Viewer { -- + getInput() + getLevel() + display() } class State { FLOOR_OUT_SIDE,WALL,FLOOR,BOX,TARGET,PLAYER,BOX_ON_TARGET } class TileType { WALL,FLOOR,TARGET } class TileFlag { NULL,PLAYER,BOX } class Diractory { UP,DOWN,LEFT,RIGHT,SITU } Game *-- Session Session *-- Map Map *-- Player Map *-- Box Map *-- Tile Tile *-- Position Player --|> Moveable Box --|> Moveable Game *-- MapRepository MapRepository *-- FileUtil Game *-- Viewer Session *-- Rule note top of Game as G C end note note top of Session as S C end note note top of Map as M C end note note top of Player as P C end note note top of Box as B C end note note top of Moveable as MV C end note note top of Tile as T C end note note top of Position as POS C end note note top of Rule as R C end note note top of MapRepository as MR C end note note top of FileUtil as FU C end note note top of Viewer as V I end note note top of State as ST E end note note top of TileType as TT E end note note top of TileFlag as TF E end note note top of Diractory as D E end note @enduml ```
